title: Confident and humble.
caption:
Most men know how to be one or the other.

Throw them in a room — they puff up. Give them a loss — they crumble. Neither is the man God's building.

Philippians 4:13 doesn't say "I am strong." It says "I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me." That's not arrogance. That's an address. Not "I'm great." "He's with me."

And humility isn't shrinking. It's not performing smallness so nobody feels threatened. It's knowing exactly who made you and what He said about you — and needing nobody's verdict.

The man who holds both doesn't need to prove himself in the room. He doesn't need to collapse when the room is gone. He's rooted.

Strong in public. On his knees in private. Same guy in both places.

That's the one worth being.

—

Comment "both" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #confidence #faithoverfear #christianity #scripture #masculinity
